summary: i18n Hardcoded String Conversion Testing - Tested language switching (EN/TR) across Auth, Dashboard, Settings, POS, Housekeeping, Mobile, Security pages. Fixed critical bug in HousekeepingDetailedReports.js that caused page crash. Language selector works correctly. Most core pages properly translated. Some pages still have hardcoded English strings.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'efficiency_rating') - added null checks

issues: Title 'POS Dashboard' still hardcoded in English - not using t() function
Title 'Staff Management & HR' still hardcoded - needs i18n conversion
'Mobile Management' title not translated, department cards show English names (Housekeeping, Front Desk, F&B)
'Housekeeping Dashboard' title hardcoded, 'Housekeeping Detailed Reports' section not translated

action_items: Pages with remaining hardcoded strings need i18n conversion: POSDashboard.js title, StaffManagement.js title, MobileDashboard.js department names, HousekeepingDashboard.js title
HousekeepingDetailedReports.js needs i18n translation keys for all labels
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: HousekeepingDetailedReports.js - Added null checks for staff.daily_stats and staff.monthly_stats to prevent crashes
i18n infrastructure (i18n.js, useTranslation hook, en.json, tr.json) is properly set up and working
Language selector on Auth page correctly switches language and persists to localStorage
Dashboard, Settings, Auth pages show correct translations for EN/TR
Some pages (POS, Staff Management, Mobile Dashboard, Housekeeping) still have hardcoded strings that weren't converted

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Core i18n working, some pages have remaining hardcoded strings

context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n conversion testing completed. HousekeepingDetailedReports.js bug fixed. Language switching works on Auth page. Dashboard, Settings pages show correct Turkish/English translations. Pages still needing i18n work: POSDashboard, StaffManagement, MobileDashboard, HousekeepingDashboard. Security Dashboard is at route /security-center not /security-dashboard.
passed_tests: Auth page loads with Language Selector
Language switching works (EN to TR and back)
Turkish auth page shows: Hoş Geldiniz, E-posta, Şifre, Giriş Yap, Otel, Misafir
English auth page shows: Welcome, Email, Password, Login, Hotel, Guest
Dashboard shows Turkish translations: Hoş geldiniz, Toplam Oda, Doluluk Oranı, Bugünkü Giriş, Toplam Misafir
Dashboard shows English translations: Welcome, Total Rooms, Occupancy Rate, Today Check-ins, Total Guests
Settings page shows Turkish: Ayarlar, Ekip, Plan, Fatura Geçmişi, Otel
Navigation bar shows Turkish: Takvim, Raporlar, Fatura & Finans, Maliyet
Security Center loads correctly at /security-center with Turkish text (Güvenlik Merkezi)
Housekeeping Dashboard loads without crash after fix

pages_with_working_translations: Settings.js - mostly translated (some hardcoded Turkish remains)
pages_needing_more_i18n_work: HousekeepingDetailedReports.js - all labels hardcoded in English
